summary: Iteration-2 testing of new features (student rollno+DOB login, admin gmail bypass, admin students CRUD + CSV bulk, anonymous found items, recovered_at timestamp + 24h auto-hide). Backend: 15/15 pytest cases passed; auto-hide verified by directly backdating recovered_at in MongoDB (unauth GET 404, admin GET 200, listing excludes the item). Frontend: 11/11 Playwright assertions passed - Student tab is default with rollno+dob+submit testids, Admin tab shows email/password/Google sign-in, student login (2514750010114 / 2005-09-14) redirects to /browse, admin login (nikkhil.agrahari1977@gmail.com / Admin@123) redirects to /admin, Report Found shows anonymous-toggle while Report Lost hides it, Browse renders anonymous items with 'by Anonymous Finder' label and recovered items with opacity-60 grayscale + 'RECOVERED' overlay, Admin > Students tab has add-form + CSV textarea + file input + upload button + students table; adding a student via form makes it appear in table immediately, delete also works.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings when container has 0 dimensions during initial render - not breaking, but noisy in console. Consider wrapping in ResponsiveContainer with explicit minHeight.

action_items: Optional: fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height warning on /admin (set minHeight on the parent div or use a fixed height).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 758 lines - has crossed the 700-line guideline; recommend splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/items.py, routers/messages.py, routers/admin.py.
JWT_SECRET still falls back to 'change-me' (line 24) - should raise on startup if missing in production env.
CORS allow_origins default '*' combined with allow_credentials=True (lines 749) - browsers reject; set explicit origin list.
/api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages still accepts raw dict payload (line 598) - should use a Pydantic MessageBody model for validation.

POST /api/items always tries to use user['name']/user['email'] - admin user docs created via signup have email but Emergent-OAuth-created admin docs are fine; consider explicit fallback on missing fields.

_item_visible() returns True when recovered_at is missing even if status != 'active' (line 346) - acceptable defensive default, but consider backfilling recovered_at when a manual seed item has status='recovered' without timestamp.

GET /api/items applies _item_visible filter AFTER limit (line 444-446): if recovered items exhaust the 100-item slice, active items beyond limit are dropped. Move filter to MongoDB query for correctness at scale.
Anonymous masking is correctly applied across list/get/conversation paths; no _id / password_hash leaks observed in any response.
test_credentials: Admin: nikkhil.agrahari1977@gmail.com / Admin@123. Students: 2514750010114 (14/09/2005), 2514750010012 (10/03/2006), 2514750010094 (25/10/2006). All from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: All test items/students prefixed 'TEST_' or 'UITEST' and cleaned up at end of each test. No residual test data expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - all 15 cases green. The 24-hour auto-hide test in pytest only asserts the < 24h case (visible); the > 24h case was validated separately by directly backdating recovered_at via motor and confirming public list excludes it, unauth single GET returns 404, and admin GET still returns 200. Frontend has data-testids for: tab-student, tab-admin, student-rollno, student-dob, student-submit, login-email, login-password, login-submit, google-signin-btn, anonymous-toggle, admin-tab-students, add-student-form, student-form-{roll,name,dob,email,branch,year,submit}, csv-textarea, csv-file-input, csv-upload-btn, student-row-{ROLL}, student-delete-{ROLL}, item-card-{id}. To verify masking on Browse, create an anon found item as student2 via POST /api/items with is_anonymous:true and load /browse unauthenticated - card shows 'by Anonymous Finder'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial Playwright run missed the Anonymous Finder label only because the seed anonymous USB item mentioned in the request did not exist in the live DB at test time; a fresh anonymous item created via API rendered correctly with the 'by Anonymous Finder' label and recovered items rendered with opacity-60 grayscale + 'RECOVERED' overlay as designed.
